title: If you want something go and get it — surface-area creed, Oct 2024
html:
TL;DR

  • A short creed Yahir wrote himself in Shanghai. "If you want something go and get it" — applied to three concrete cases: see a cute girl and want to say hi (do it), have an idea and see potential (do it), want to reach out to someone (do it).
  • The reframe line: "Don't let life happen to you, shift to letting it happen for you."
  • The partner-search application: "You arbitrarily want a beautiful wife — don't do this passively: become best self, expand surface area of luck by spontaneous encounters that you induce." And the bookend: "the women who changed your life and enhanced your legacy."

Key quote

"Become best self, expand surface area of luck by spontaneous encounters that you induce."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Cleanest articulation of Yahir's surface area of luck doctrine — directly inherits from the 2024-05-08 lottery-criteria ("she's the one") thinking but reframes it as the operating practice rather than the criterion.
  • "Don't let life happen to you" is the actionable form of the walk with gods eyes / "god favors max effort" cluster.
  • "The women who changed your life and enhanced your legacy" — confirms Yahir frames partner-encounters retrospectively as legacy events, not transactions. Pairs with 2024 05 08 biggest lesson and 2026 03 24 alignment misalignment.

Open questions

  • Did this trigger a specific encounter / change in approach in October 2024 Shanghai?
  • "Women who changed your life" — anyone besides sam and emily in the corpus by name?

Wikilinks
